text: The surgeon grasps and elevates the appendix to expose the mesoappendix. The mesoappendix is then dissected using ligature, separating it from the appendix.

The surgeon ligates the arteria appendicularis using a plastic polymer endoclip and cuts it with ligature. The stump of the appendix is closed with two plastic polymer endoclips, and the appendix is transected with scissors. The appendix is then placed in a specimen bag and removed from the abdomen.
